{{Quote|This Clone War of yours? Who cares? You think anybody on Haruun Kal gives a handful of snot who rules on Coruscant? We kill seppies because they give weapons and supplies to the Balawai. The Balawai support the seppies because they get stuff like those gunships. For free, too. They used to have to buy them and ship 'em in from Opari. You follow?|[[Nick Rostu]]|<ref name="Shatterpoint" />}}
'''Opari''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Opari system/Legends|Opari system]]<ref name="Shatterpoint" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It provided the [[Balawai]] government on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] with [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
